summary: Business Analytics graduate student with experience in data analytics, business intelligence, and operations. Background in M&A advisory, business analysis, and product development with expertise in statistical modeling, SQL, and data visualization. Proven track record in founding and scaling organizations, leading product launches, and driving strategic initiatives.

education.fieldOfStudy: Liberal Arts and Sciences (Economics and Information Management)

workHistory.title: Chief Operating Officer
bullets: Led the end-to-end development of WeKruit, an AI-driven multi-agent consulting interview prep platform that simulates human-like live case interviews and provides detailed, unbiased evaluations and trainings.
Defined the product roadmap, and overseen the agile development process, launching the MVP within six weeks.
Led user research and market analysis; partnered with engineers to execute rapid, data-informed product iterations.
Initiated monetization through both B2C subscriptions and B2B partnerships, securing early revenue and validating product-market fit.
Represented WeKruit at pitch competitions and VC meetings to attract fundings.
workHistory.description: Leading operations for AI-driven consulting interview prep SaaS startup
achievements: Secured early revenue through B2C and B2B monetization strategies

workHistory.title: Data Analytics and Business Intelligence Intern
bullets: Analyzed six years of UN budget allocations and human resources KPI data using SQL, evaluating process efficiencies including onboarding and separation service design, created management dashboards with PowerBI.

Employed statistical modeling and data visualization on complex datasets with 20,000 rows and over 50 scales to derive actionable insights, contributing to strategic decision-making and operational efficiency improvements.
workHistory.description: Analyzed UN budget allocations and HR KPIs to improve operational efficiency
achievements: Analyzed 6 years of budget data and created management dashboards
Processed complex datasets with 20,000 rows and 50+ scales

workHistory.title: Mergers and Acquisitions Advisory Trainee
bullets: Facilitated communication between client executives, legal teams, sell-side advisory team, and acquisition target.

Performed due diligence on a local delivery company through 10+ expert interviews, financial valuation, operational efficiency, synergy and risk analysis to calculate the company's value and competitive advantages.
Coordinated the completion of an M&A contract, aiming for sustainable revenue growth and a 7% increase in market share over five years.
Engaged in executive Q&A sessions to present and discuss findings.
workHistory.description: Conducted M&A due diligence and valuation analysis for acquisition targets
achievements: Conducted 10+ expert interviews for due diligence
Contributed to M&A contract targeting 7% market share increase over five years

workHistory.title: Business Analysis and Company Compliance Intern
bullets: Analyzed and visualized over 120,000 data rows on sales through CRM and ERP system using Excel and Tableau, produced 10+ comprehensive industry reports and market analyses to inform strategic pivots for the brand.
Designed and executed digital marketing promotions to boost customer engagement, utilizing targeted online campaigns and analytics to drive traffic and increase online-to-offline conversion rates.

Implemented a successful partnership that transformed close-to-expiration inventory into surprised sales, reducing food waste by approximately 3,600kg per month, and leveraging pick-ups to drive in-store customer conversion.
Expanded pick-up point network by outreaching 30+ local businesses as partners, resulting in 11% sales growth.
workHistory.description: Analyzed sales data and executed digital marketing campaigns for overseas expansion strategy
achievements: Analyzed 120,000+ data rows and produced 10+ industry reports
Reduced food waste by 3,600kg per month through strategic partnership
Achieved 11% sales growth through pick-up point network expansion

volunteerWork.description: Founded a non-profit organization focused on the social integration of autistic children. Established partnerships with 21 institutions and managed 80+ active volunteers. Led integrated marketing campaigns, designed and executed 20+ interviews, organized 17 public lectures and campus events, and inspired over 150K people through awareness and support initiatives.
